## Runtime.Session.ISaveResult.journalEntry property

The full journal entry if one was created. Callers can use this to persist the journal via `context.journals.addJournal(entry)`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly journalEntry?: IFillingEditJournalEntryEntity | IConfectionEditJournalEntryEntity;
```
